description_long: This is a heavily modified, post-apocalyptic style convertible car with a rusted, weathered red exterior and a black, partially torn soft top. The car features aggressive metal spikes and reinforced bars on the front bumper, suggesting it is designed for protection or ramming. The sides are equipped with makeshift armor and a large external fuel tank mounted on the rear, secured with metal brackets and pipes. The wheels are worn and the bodywork is dented, with visible signs of age and neglect, including chipped paint and corrosion. The interior appears stripped down, with minimal seating and exposed framework, emphasizing its utilitarian, survivalist design. Overall, the vehicle exudes a rugged, battle-ready aesthetic reminiscent of vehicles from dystopian fiction.
description: A rusted, armored convertible car with a black soft top, front spikes, and a rear-mounted fuel tank, showing heavy wear and post-apocalyptic modifications.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the external fuel tank, metal framework, and worn rear bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rusted body, side armor, and exposed interior.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the aggressive metal spikes and reinforced bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible side armor and rear fuel tank.
